title: LukAdminChat
description: Plugin for admin chat, by default you can use the admin chat by adding "!" in your chat bar
body:
# LukAdminChat

This plugin adds an in-game admin chat. By default you can type in the admin chat by adding an exclamation mark(!) in front of your message, though it can be configured in the config.yml file.

**By default everyone that has OP can see and use the admin chat, but you can add the permission "lukadminchat.use" to the player via LuckPerms or a similar plugin to make the player be able to see and use the admin chat.**

You can also configure the appearance of the messages in the config.yml file

### This is how the admin chat messages look by default
![Default appearance of messages on the admin chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c349768d422abfba08358edbd5544cc567cc1f.png)

You can report any issues in the discord: [Here!](https://discord.gg/FxQDmSwnbY)
